ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Crowdfunding ID for the project */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact (creator) associated with the project */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company or individual creating the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Funding goal for the project */,
  "pledged" INTEGER /* Amount pledged to the project */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the project (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers supporting the project */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the project */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the project was launched */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project ended */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the project is a staff pick */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the project is a spotlight */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the project belongs to */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the project belongs to */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., live, expired, cancelled) */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* URL of the project page */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the project video */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the project image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, backer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subcategory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subcategory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the update belongs to */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was posted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledges" (
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the pledge was made to */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer who made the pledge */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the pledge */,
  "pledge_date" TEXT /* Date the pledge was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pledge was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pledge was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the reward belongs to */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_amount" INTEGER /* Amount required to receive the reward */,
  "limit" INTEGER /* Number of backers who can receive the reward */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_backers" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the backer relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the backer relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tags" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)
